modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need guidance on secure remote work practices.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to figure out how to work securely from home or when I'm traveling. It's really important to me to keep my data safe while using my web browser. I just want to make sure I'm doing everything right, you know?
short_description: Need guidance on secure remote work practices.
description: I'm trying to figure out how to work securely from home or when I'm traveling. It's really important to me to keep my data safe while using my web browser. I just want to make sure I'm doing everything right, you know?
